summary: All 8 requested features verified working: 1) Project name input editable in left sidebar, 2) Project save downloads JSON, 3) Project load button present, 4) PDF € button exports with prices, 5) PDF button exports quantities only, 6) Laskenta tab shows 'Yhteenveto' instead of 'Kustannukset', 7) Wall height change updates all walls, 8) Grouped summary 'Yhteenveto tyypeittäin' section present in Määrälaskenta panel
critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 VERIFIED: LeftSidebar.js lines 86-95 has project name input with data-testid='project-name-input'
Feature 2 VERIFIED: storage.js exportProjectToJSON function properly exports JSON with project name in filename
Feature 3 VERIFIED: storage.js importProjectFromJSON function and Toolbar.js Load button properly implemented
Feature 4 VERIFIED: export.js exportToPDF function with grouped measurements and prices
Feature 5 VERIFIED: export.js exportToPDFQuantitiesOnly function exports quantities only without prices
Feature 6 VERIFIED: CalculatorPanel.js line 61-62 shows 'Yhteenveto' heading under 'Laskenta' title
Feature 7 VERIFIED: App.js handleGlobalWallHeightChange (line 477-487) updates all wall, pystykotelo measurements with new height
Feature 8 VERIFIED: TakeoffPanel.js lines 700-717 shows 'Yhteenveto tyypeittäin' grouped summary section
seed_data_creation: None needed - tested with empty state and verified UI elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client-side only React app for PDF takeoff and cost estimation. All features verified: project name input, save/load JSON, two PDF export versions (with prices 'PDF €' and quantities only 'PDF'), 'Yhteenveto' heading in Laskenta tab, global wall height change, grouped summary in Määrälaskenta. Testing requires PDF upload + measurement creation via tools.

tests_executed.details: Input field accepts and displays new project name
Tallenna button triggers JSON file download with project name in filename
Lataa button present with file input handler
Button shows 'PDF €' text, calls exportToPDF with prices
Laskenta tab shows 'Yhteenveto' heading, 'Kustannukset' not present
Shows 'Muuttaa kaikkien seinien korkeuden' helper text
TakeoffPanel.js has 'Yhteenveto tyypeittäin' section (visible when measurements exist)
